title: Catalytic Pyrolysis of Mixed Plastic Waste Process Schema
description: Master standard schema combining the strongest elements from 12 model outputs across 3 stages. Primary structure from qwen3-235b-a22b, with targeted additions from qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct-2507, mistralai-Ministral-3-8B-Reasoning-2512, mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-2512, and Qwen-Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507.

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier for the publication.

research_institution.description: Institution where the research was conducted.

feedstock.description: Input plastic waste characteristics determining degradation mechanisms and product distribution.

type.description: Primary category of polymeric material used as input.

composition.description: Relative proportions of polymer types in input stream (sum must equal 1.0). Required when type is mixed.

moisture_content.description: Moisture content of feedstock as weight percentage.

particle_size.description: Particle size of feedstock after preprocessing.

preprocessing.description: Feedstock pretreatment steps applied before pyrolysis.

contaminants.description: Contaminant content of the feedstock, critical for real mixed plastic waste containing PVC and multilayer packaging.

chlorine_content_ppm.description: Chlorine content in parts per million (ppm).

heavy_metals_ppm.description: Total heavy metals content in parts per million (ppm).

subtype.description: Specific catalyst subtype or commercial designation (e.g., HZSM-5, Y-zeolite, Al-MCM-41).

ratio.description: Mass ratio between catalyst and plastic feedstock.

activation_method.description: Method used to activate or prepare the catalyst before use (e.g., calcination temperature and duration).

reusability_cycles.description: Number of times the catalyst can be reused before significant deactivation.

deactivation_mechanism.description: Primary mechanism of catalyst deactivation (e.g., coking, sintering, poisoning).

coke_formation_rate.description: Rate of coke deposition on catalyst surface (wt% per cycle or per hour).

configuration.description: Design and operational setup of the reactor.

volume.description: Reactor volume in mL or L.

pressure.description: Operating pressure in bar or atm.

inert_gas_flow_rate.description: Flow rate of inert gas in mL/min.

process_conditions.description: Operational parameters of the pyrolysis process.

heating_rate.description: Rate of temperature increase in degrees Celsius per minute.

residence_time.description: Duration the feedstock remains in reaction conditions in minutes.

carrier_gas.description: Carrier gas type and flow rate.

validation_method.description: Approach for process verification (optional, rarely reported in literature).

yields.description: Product yield distribution from the pyrolysis process.

liquid.description: Liquid product yield as weight percentage of feedstock.

gas.description: Gas product yield as weight percentage of feedstock.

char.description: Solid residue yield as weight percentage of feedstock.

mass_balance_closure.description: Sum of all product yields as percentage. Values below 95% or above 105% should be flagged. Critical for experimental validation.

product_composition.description: Chemical composition and quality metrics of each product fraction.

aliphatics_pct.description: Aliphatic hydrocarbon content as weight percentage.

aromatics_pct.description: Aromatic hydrocarbon content as weight percentage.

oxygenates_pct.description: Oxygenated compound content as weight percentage.

liquid_quality.description: Quality metrics of the liquid product relevant for fuel or chemical applications.

hhv_mj_per_kg.description: Higher heating value in MJ/kg (typically 37-45 MJ/kg for pyrolysis oils).

chlorine_ppm.description: Chlorine content in liquid product in ppm.

density_g_per_ml.description: Density of liquid oil in g/mL.

c2_c4_pct.description: C2-C4 hydrocarbon content as volume percentage.

carbon_content_pct.description: Carbon content of char as weight percentage.

ash_content_pct.description: Ash content of char as weight percentage.

catalyst_content_pct.description: Residual catalyst content in char as weight percentage.

analytical_characterisation.description: Analytical characterization methods applied to feedstock, products, and catalyst. Three-level structure reflecting how characterization is reported in catalytic pyrolysis literature.

feedstock_analysis.description: Analytical methods used for feedstock characterization.

product_analysis.description: Analytical methods used for product characterization.

catalyst_analysis.description: Analytical methods used for catalyst characterization (fresh and spent).

performance_metrics.description: Key performance indicators of the overall pyrolysis process.

conversion_efficiency_percent.description: Percentage of feedstock converted into products.

energy_efficiency.description: Ratio of energy output to energy input for the process.

catalyst_lifetime.description: Estimated catalyst lifetime in hours or cycles.
